'''Rustibar''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Sulamar]], a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], claimed to be an Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] and to be responsible for the Imperial [[Rout of Rustibar|victory]] on Rustibar.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1stm}}
